content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be restructured around a core, recursive "meta-agent" that actively selects which curiosity-driven exploration trajectories to persist in long-term memory, rather than passively storing all observed data. This meta-agent inherits the same curiosity-driven active learning principles that guide the base agent’s environment interaction, turning memory curation into a second-order active learning problem.
